steps.title: Identify points from each game type
steps.content:
A draw earns 1 point each, and the participant played $d$ games that ended in a draw. So draws contribute $1 \cdot d = d$ points total.
A win earns 3 points each, and the participant won $w$ games. So wins contribute $3 \cdot w = 3w$ points total.

steps.title: Combine to form the total points equation
steps.content:
The participant earned 41 points total. This equals the points from draws plus points from wins:
$$d + 3w = 41$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
